sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51841" key="kaqippokrate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθιππο-κρᾰτέω</orth>, <sense id="n51841.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conquer with horse</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:164" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.164</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:141" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.141</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
